title: Phi
description: A Psi addon that aims to extend the spellcasting experience with new tricks, tools, mechanics and more
body:
Phi is an addon to [Psi](https://modrinth.com/mod/psi), a mod by [Vazkii](https://modrinth.com/user/Vazkii).

Phi aims to extend the spellcasting experience with new interesting tools, tricks and mechanics while keeping the theme of the mod.

For a list of features, see the [Phi wiki](https://github.com/gdavid04/phi/wiki).
